parameter.defaultValue: 2. Adding Guest from Wallet after Creating an Event
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: 3. Adding User from Wallet after Creating an Event
parameter.name: Text

parameter.defaultValue: 5. Adding Items in B-App with 1 Guest
parameter.name: Text
